title: ADCS ESC4: Certificate Template ACL Modification via Certipy
description: Detects ESC4 abuse where an attacker with write access to a certificate template reconfigures it to become ESC1-vulnerable (enrollee-supplied SAN, client-auth EKU). Certipy 'template' with -write/-save performs this template takeover before requesting an impersonation certificate.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*certipy*' and 'Command Line' like '*template*')) and (('Command Line' like '*-write*' or 'Command Line' like '*-save-old*' or 'Command Line' like '*-configuration*')))
